---
title: "CosMx Tonsil strucutres - Differences"
author: "Samuel Gunz"
date:  last-modified
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      self-contained: true
      highlight-style: github
      code-line-numbers: true
output-dir: "../docs/"
---
# Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library("SpatialExperiment")
library("sosta")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
library("dplyr")
library("sf")
library("smoothr")
library("spdep")
library("ggspavis")
library("mumosa")

theme_set(theme_bw())
```

Read in data

```{r}
spe <- readRDS("~/data_no_backup/CosMx_TVA/110.rds")
spe <- toSpatialExperiment(spe, spatialCoordsNames = c("CenterX_global_px", "CenterY_global_px"))
```


```{r}
# selected fov of interest
ls <- c(105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, 111,
        133, 134, 135, 136, 137, 138, 139,
        96, 97, 98,
        #25, 
        26,
        27, 28, 29, 30,
        #382, 383, 384,
        46, 47, 48, 49,
        50, 51, 
        #52,
        59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64, 65,
        92, 93, 94, 95)

gc()
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 9

cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = typ)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.15, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=4))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::okabe(8)[-1]))
```



```{r}
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(fov %in% ls) |>
  filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = fov)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() 
```
```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("navy", "gold", "firebrick")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3)))
```

# Structures per ROI

```{r}
spe$typ |> unique()
```


```{r}
#| eval: false

int <- shapeIntensityImage(
  spe[,!is.na(spe$typ)],
  marks = "lv1",
  imageCol = "typ",
  imageId = c("110_TVA2"),
  markSelect = "epi"
)
```


```{r}
params <- estimateReconstructionParametersSPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "typ",
    markSelect = "epi",
    plotHist = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
mean(params$thres)
mean(params$bndw)
```

```{r}
resSub <- reconstructShapeDensityImage(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "fov",
    imageId = ls,
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 9.5E-5,
    dim = 750
)
```


```{r}
cs1 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(pals::alphabet(26))(dim(resSub)[1])

resSub |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```


```{r}
#| column: screen
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-heigth: 8 
spe |>
  (\(x) x[, colData(x)$fov %in% ls])() |>
  (\(x) cbind(spatialCoords(x), colData(x)))() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "lightgoldenrod", "orchid")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.25
  )
```
# All structs

```{r}
spe$foo <- "foo" # mock variable

res1 <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "foo",
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 9.5E-5,
    dim = 2000
)

structs <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "typ",
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 9E-5,
    dim = 2000
)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(res1)[1], replace = TRUE)

res1 |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(structs)[1], replace = TRUE)

structs |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```

## Custom code to assign cells to strucutres

> To be implemented in sosta Bioc update

```{r}
library(parallel)
df <- .SPE2df(spe, "typ")

dls <- split(df, as.factor(df[, "typ"]))
res <- mclapply(dls, function(dfSel) {
  sel <- unique(dfSel[, "typ"])
  structsSel <- structs[structs[["typ"]] == sel, 
  ]
  spatialCoordsSf <- st_as_sf(dfSel[, c(1, 2)], coords = c(colnames(dfSel)[1], 
                                                           colnames(dfSel)[2]))
  n <- st_intersects(spatialCoordsSf, structsSel, sparse = FALSE)
  n_list <- apply(n, 1, function(x) which(x == TRUE)[1])
  res <- ifelse(n_list == 0, NA, structsSel[["structID"]][n_list])
  return(res)
}, mc.cores = 1)
```


```{r}
spe$typ0 <- ifelse(is.na(spe$typ), 0, spe$typ)
colData(spe)$structAssign <- NA
```

This takes ages, why?!?

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
colData(spe[,spe$typ0 == "110_CRC"])$structAssign <- res$`110_CRC`
colData(spe[,spe$typ0 == "110_REF"])$structAssign <- res$`110_REF`
colData(spe[,spe$typ0 ==  "110_TVA1" ])$structAssign <- res$`110_TVA1`
colData(spe[,spe$typ0 == "110_TVA2"])$structAssign <- res$`110_TVA2`
colData(spe[,spe$typ0 == "110_TVA3"])$structAssign <- res$`110_TVA3`
```

More efficient way here: 
```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
spe$structAssign2 <- NA  # initialize if not already present
spe$structAssign2[spe$typ0 == "110_TVA3"] <- res$`110_TVA3`
```

```{r}
assignStruct <- function(spe, resList, typ0Vals, 
                         typ0 = "typ0", structAssign = "structAssign") {
  # Initialize the structAssign column if it doesn't exist
  if (!structAssign %in% colnames(colData(spe))) {
    colData(spe)[[structAssign]] <- NA
  }
  
  for (typ0Val in typ0Vals) {
    mask <- colData(spe)[[typ0]] == typ0Val
    colData(spe)[[structAssign]][mask] <- resList[[typ0Val]]
  }
  
  return(spe)
}

typ0Vals <- c("110_CRC", "110_REF", "110_TVA1", "110_TVA2", "110_TVA3")
spe <- assignStruct(spe, res, typ0Vals)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 25
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE & fov %in% ls) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = structAssign)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cs1)) +
  guides(colour = "none") +
    geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```

# Struct metrics


```{r}
shapeMetrics <- totalShapeMetrics(structs)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(structs, t(shapeMetrics)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = fibreWidth, color = fibreWidth)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "A") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A")
```
```{r}
shapeMetricsSub <- totalShapeMetrics(resSub)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(resSub, t(shapeMetricsSub)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = fibreWidth, color = fibreWidth)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "A") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A")
```

# Filter structs

```{r}
fq <- quantile(shapeMetrics["Area",], c(0.1))
```



```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(resSub, t(shapeMetricsSub)) |>
  filter(Area > fq[1]) |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = Area, color = Area)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C")
```

```{r}
filts <- names(which(shapeMetrics["Area", ] > fq[1]))
spe$structAssignFilt <- ifelse(spe$structAssign %in% filts, spe$structAssign, NA)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 20

cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(structs)[1], replace = TRUE)


cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE & fov %in% ls) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = structAssignFilt)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cs1)) +
  guides(colour = "none") +
    geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```


# Aggregate across cells

```{r}
library("BiocParallel")
library("scater")
bpparam <- MulticoreParam(6)

out <- aggregateAcrossCells(spe, spe$structAssignFilt,
                     statistics = "prop.detected",
                     BPPARAM = bpparam)
```

Merge with structure metrics

```{r}
aggMet <- t(shapeMetrics) |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ids") |> 
  rename(structArea = Area ) |> 
  right_join(as.data.frame(colData(out)), by = "ids") |> 
  tibble::column_to_rownames("ids")
```

## Prop detectedd

```{r}
feats <- c("structArea", "Compactness", "Eccentricity", "Circularity",
                 "Solidity", "Curl", "fibreLength", "fibreWidth")


geneCors <- computeCorrelations(counts(out),
                    t(as.matrix(aggMet[out$ids, feats])),
                    BPPARAM = bpparam
                    )
```

```{r}
selG <- names(which(rowSums(counts(out)) / dim(out)[2] > 0.1))

"OLFM4" %in% selG
```



```{r}
sign_corrs <- geneCors[!is.na(geneCors$FDR),]
sign_corrs <- sign_corrs[sign_corrs$FDR < 0.1,]
sign_corrs <- sign_corrs[order(abs(sign_corrs$rho), decreasing = TRUE),]
```

```{r}
sel.correlcation <- sign_corrs[sign_corrs$feature2 %in% c("fibreWidth"),]

sel.correlcation |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(feature1 %in% selG) |> 
  arrange(desc(rho)) |> 
  head(n = 20)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
plotCoords(spe,
          annotate = "RNF44",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```

## Bulk Sum

```{r}
outSum <- aggregateAcrossCells(spe, spe$structAssignFilt,
                     statistics = "sum",
                     BPPARAM = bpparam)
```


```{r}
geneCorsSum <- computeCorrelations(counts(outSum),
                    t(as.matrix(aggMet[out$ids, feats])),
                    BPPARAM = bpparam
                    )
```

```{r}
gene_corrs_Sum <- geneCorsSum[!is.na(geneCorsSum$FDR),]
gene_corrs_Sum <- gene_corrs_Sum[gene_corrs_Sum$FDR < 0.1,]
gene_corrs_Sum <- gene_corrs_Sum[order(abs(gene_corrs_Sum$rho), decreasing = TRUE),]

gene_corrs_Sum
```

```{r}
sel.correlcationSum <- gene_corrs_Sum[gene_corrs_Sum$feature2 %in% c("fibreWidth"),]

sel.correlcationSum |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  arrange(desc(rho)) |> 
  head(n = 20)
```

```{r}
gene_corrs_Sum[gene_corrs_Sum$feature1 == "OLFM4",]
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
plotCoords(spe,
          annotate = "RSPH1",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```

```{r}
plotCoords(outSum,
          annotate = "SPEG",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```
## Bulk Mean

```{r}
outMean <- aggregateAcrossCells(spe, spe$structAssignFilt,
                     statistics = "mean",
                     BPPARAM = bpparam)
```


```{r}
geneCorsMean <- computeCorrelations(counts(outMean),
                    t(as.matrix(aggMet[out$ids, feats])),
                    BPPARAM = bpparam
                    )
```

```{r}
gene_corrs_Mean <- geneCorsMean[!is.na(geneCorsMean$FDR),]
gene_corrs_Mean <- gene_corrs_Mean[gene_corrs_Mean$FDR < 0.1,]
gene_corrs_Mean <- gene_corrs_Mean[order(abs(gene_corrs_Mean$rho), decreasing = TRUE),]

gene_corrs_Mean
```

```{r}
sel.correlcationMean <- gene_corrs_Mean[gene_corrs_Mean$feature2 %in% c("fibreWidth"),]

sel.correlcationMean |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  arrange(rho) |> 
  filter(feature1 %in% selG) |> 
  tail(n = 20)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
plotCoords(spe,
          annotate = "ORC1",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```
